title: DrHomes Advance Home Plugin Like DonutSmp
description: DrHomes is a modern high performance GUI based homes plugin for Minecraft 1.20+ with full customization and gradient support easily manage thousands of homes with a clean interface fast teleportation and zero lag async storage
body:
# 🌍 TRY THIS PLUGIN LIVE ON BOLT SMP [![Bolt SMP](https://i.ibb.co/LMJLVWf/standard-3.gif)](https://discord.gg/UUaNzfZyc6)

🏠 DrHomes

Advanced multi-home GUI system for Minecraft

--- ## 🚀 Description **DrHomes** is a powerful, modern, and scalable home management plugin designed for Minecraft servers running **1.20+**. Built for performance and user experience, it provides a **clean GUI-based system**, **fully customizable messages**, and support for **thousands of homes without lag**. > ✨ Designed to feel like a premium plugin used on top-tier servers. --- ## ✨ Features * 🧠 **Smart Home System** — Supports **10,000+ homes** * 🎨 **Modern UI & Messaging** — Hex + Gradient support * 📦 **Paginated GUI (36 Slots)** — Clean & smart navigation * ⚡ **Async Storage** — No lag YAML system * 🚫 **Teleport Safety** — Movement cancel + safe checks * 🛠 **Admin Tools** — Full control system --- ## 📸 Preview

--- ## 🧾 Commands ### 👤 Player ``` /home /home /home rename /home remove ``` ### 🛠 Admin ``` /drhomes reload /drhomes see homes /drhomes home add /drhomes home remove ``` --- ## 🔐 Permissions ### Player * `drhomes.` * `drhomes.rename` ### Admin * `drhomes.admin` --- ## ⚙️ Configuration ### 🎨 Colors & Gradients Supports: * `&` colors * `&#HEX` * `` Example: ``` Welcome Home ``` --- ### ⏳ Teleport Settings * `countdown` * `movement-behavior` → `CANCEL` / `NONE` --- ## 🌐 Links & Support

--- ## ❤️ Credits Developed by **Flaxa Technologies** --- ## 📌 Why DrHomes? ✔ Clean GUI ✔ High performance ✔ Fully customizable ✔ Built for real servers > Stop using outdated home plugins — upgrade to DrHomes.
